scripts.db:up: docker run -d --name inv-postgres -e POSTGRES_DB=inventory -e POSTGRES_USER=postgres -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres -p 5432:5432 -v inv_postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data postgres:15 || docker start inv-postgres
scripts.db:setup: prisma migrate dev && npm run seed
scripts.db:reset: prisma migrate reset --force && npm run seed
scripts.dev:setup: npm run db:up && sleep 5 && npm run db:setup
